bonus_rules.condition: Review pass with complete report, valid JSON, no protected path violation and clean branch.
Accepted R&D suggestion converted by Codex into a formal WorkOrder.
Verified bug, security gap, broken link, invalid JSON or protected path risk reported with evidence.

penalty_rules.effect: Freeze related account and require Human review.

penalty_rules.condition: Missing report, missing provenance or invisible commit.
penalty_rules.effect: Withhold task reward until evidence is corrected.

penalty_rules.condition: Duplicate commit or repeated task evidence submitted for additional pay.

non_negotiable: No AI access to private keys, seed phrases or signing authority.
No mixed-unit settlement without explicit reviewed conversion.
